events.title: Kennedy Center: Behind the Scenes
events.summary: Discover the Kennedy Center’s rich history as a cultural cornerstone since its 1971 opening. Volunteer George Cecchetti will share nearly 40 years of behind-the-scenes experiences, from his start with Washington National Opera in 1987 to becoming a Kennedy Center Friend in 2011. Join us for an engaging insider perspective.
